CVE-2014-2524.title: The _rl_tropen function in util.c in GNU readline before 6.3 patc ...
CVE-2014-2524.description: The _rl_tropen function in util.c in GNU readline before 6.3 patch 3 allows local users to create or overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack on a /var/tmp/rltrace.[PID] file.

CVE-2016-7091.title: sudo: It was discovered that the default sudo configuration on Re ...
CVE-2016-7091.description: sudo: It was discovered that the default sudo configuration on Red Hat Enterprise Linux and possibly other Linux implementations preserves the value of INPUTRC which could lead to information disclosure. A local user with sudo access to a restricted program that uses readline could use this flaw to read content from specially formatted files with elevated privileges provided by sudo.
